evidence: Person missing recommended: jobTitle, sameAs, hasCredential
FAQPage schema has 7 Questions but page shows ~14 FAQ pairs

No TL;DR block (expected

or paragraph starting with 'TL;DR:')
No visible 'Last updated' / 'Last reviewed' / 'Next review' stamp on page (schema dateModified alone isn't enough for users or AI)
Author has no sameAs URLs (should link LinkedIn + at least one other profile)
Author has no jobTitle or description — credentials not stated
No first-party data signals ("we tested", "our data shows", "we analyzed"). Add at least one concrete observation
Only 3/4 human signals present (author+LinkedIn=false, first-party data=false, original visual=true, 3+ citations=true). High AI-content-flag risk
Specific human voice vs committee 2/10 — Reads as corporate editorial with no individual voice; hedged, brand-safe phrasing throughout.

suggestedPatch.target: By Valeo Health Editorial | 2026-04-23 | 8 min read A pragmatic Q1 health check is the single best lever Dubai residents have for real wellness progress.
suggestedPatch.before: By Valeo Health Editorial | 2026-04-23 | 8 min read A pragmatic Q1 health check is the single best lever Dubai residents have for real wellness progress.
suggestedPatch.after: I've watched most of my January clients quietly abandon their goals by mid-March—and a 15-minute late-March check-in is what pulls them back.
suggestedPatch.rationale: Humanization axis "Specific human voice vs committee" scored 2/10: Reads as corporate editorial with no individual voice; hedged, brand-safe phrasing throughout.

evidence: Genuine opinions vs safe claims 3/10 — Claims are all evidence-hedged; no opinions that could offend or be wrong.

suggestedPatch.target: Structured reviews, not self-criticism, are what reliably drive people back into healthy routines.
suggestedPatch.before: Structured reviews, not self-criticism, are what reliably drive people back into healthy routines.
suggestedPatch.after: Forget journaling apps and willpower hacks—none of it works as well as sitting down for 15 minutes with a pen and a hard look at your bloodwork.
suggestedPatch.rationale: Humanization axis "Genuine opinions vs safe claims" scored 3/10: Claims are all evidence-hedged; no opinions that could offend or be wrong.

evidence: Unexpected phrasings 2/10 — Phrases like 'evidence-backed,' 'unique lifestyle,' 'compassionately,' 'pragmatic lever' are pure AI boilerplate.

suggestedPatch.target: This evidence-backed review helps you sustain 2026 wellness goals and connect health habits to your unique UAE lifestyle.
suggestedPatch.before: This evidence-backed review helps you sustain 2026 wellness goals and connect health habits to your unique UAE lifestyle.
suggestedPatch.after: This review shows you how to rescue the goals you've already half-forgotten—and tie them to the sweat, fasts, and 45°C afternoons that actually shape your year.
suggestedPatch.rationale: Humanization axis "Unexpected phrasings" scored 2/10: Phrases like 'evidence-backed,' 'unique lifestyle,' 'compassionately,' 'pragmatic lever' are pure AI boilerplate.

evidence: Specific citations 6/10 — Has numbers, AED prices, DHA rules—but references are vague bracket tags with no authors, dates, or URLs; stats feel fabricated.

suggestedPatch.target: BMJ’s 2024 meta-analysis found that adults who reviewed their health goals in the first quarter increased their odds of sticking with changes by 31% compared to those who only checked progress annually.
suggestedPatch.before: BMJ’s 2024 meta-analysis found that adults who reviewed their health goals in the first quarter increased their odds of sticking with changes by 31% compared to those who only checked progress annually.
suggestedPatch.after: Cite the lead author, journal issue, and sample size—e.g., 'Chen et al., BMJ 2024;384:e077, n=12,400'—so the figure is verifiable.
suggestedPatch.rationale: Humanization axis "Specific citations" scored 6/10: Has numbers, AED prices, DHA rules—but references are vague bracket tags with no authors, dates, or URLs; stats feel fabricated.

evidence: Point of view vs balanced survey 4/10 — Mostly neutral institutional summary; rare mild stances are immediately softened.

suggestedPatch.target: Adjust expectations down if needed; MOHAP and WHO highlight consistency, not intensity, as the foundation of well-being in Dubai’s environmental contexts.
suggestedPatch.before: Adjust expectations down if needed; MOHAP and WHO highlight consistency, not intensity, as the foundation of well-being in Dubai’s environmental contexts.
suggestedPatch.after: Lower your target. Consistency beats intensity here—anyone telling you to grind through July afternoons in Dubai is selling something.
suggestedPatch.rationale: Humanization axis "Point of view vs balanced survey" scored 4/10: Mostly neutral institutional summary; rare mild stances are immediately softened.

evidence: Quotable sentence 2/10 — Nothing memorable; everything is reportage-flat.

suggestedPatch.target: No single habit matters as much as the next scheduled check-in.
suggestedPatch.before: No single habit matters as much as the next scheduled check-in.
suggestedPatch.after: Your willpower expires in February; your calendar doesn't.
suggestedPatch.rationale: Humanization axis "Quotable sentence" scored 2/10: Nothing memorable; everything is reportage-flat.

evidence: Intro earns attention 3/10 — Opens with keyword-stuffed thesis statement; no hook, image, or stake.

suggestedPatch.target: A pragmatic Q1 health check is the single best lever Dubai residents have for real wellness progress.
suggestedPatch.before: A pragmatic Q1 health check is the single best lever Dubai residents have for real wellness progress.
suggestedPatch.after: By March 23rd, two out of three people reading this have already quit their 2026 resolution. Fifteen minutes this weekend can reverse that.
suggestedPatch.rationale: Humanization axis "Intro earns attention" scored 3/10: Opens with keyword-stuffed thesis statement; no hook, image, or stake.

evidence: intro_hook 6/10 — The actual opening two sentences are the Quick Answer box and a stat sentence, not a narrative hook. The stat is promising raw material but the construction is passive and antiseptic ('a trend confirmed by'). The follow-on sentence buries the payoff ('surprisingly gentle') too late. The rewrite fuses the alarming stat with the counterintuitive solution in one punchy sentence, earning attention immediately.

suggestedPatch.target: By late March 2026, 64% of UAE adults aiming for new year health goals will have stepped away from their resolutions, a trend confirmed by Lancet data on Q1 adherence.
suggestedPatch.before: By late March 2026, 64% of UAE adults aiming for new year health goals will have stepped away from their resolutions, a trend confirmed by Lancet data on Q1 adherence.
suggestedPatch.after: By late March 2026, 64% of UAE adults who set health goals in January will have quietly abandoned them — and a 15-minute structured review, not more willpower, is the only intervention with Lancet-level evidence to reverse that slide.
suggestedPatch.rationale: Quality axis "intro_hook" scored 6/10: The actual opening two sentences are the Quick Answer box and a stat sentence, not a narrative hook. The stat is promising raw material but the construction is passive and antiseptic ('a trend confirmed by'). The follow-on sentence buries the payoff ('surprisingly gentle') too late. The rewrite fuses the alarming stat with the counterintuitive solution in one punchy sentence, earning attention immediately.
